confidence_rationale: This video is purely educational/promotional material about FLS requirements for 2020 graduates. It contains animated slides, narration about program requirements, testing center locations, and contact information. No actual peg transfer performance is shown. No instruments, pegboard, or rubber objects are visible. Scoring is not applicable.

verbal_cues: Residents who graduate in the 2020 academic year and beyond must complete FLS
FLS is part of an initiative to incorporate simulation and standardize training
FLS establishes an objective measure for primary specialty certification
Testing centers located across the United States

notes: This video is an institutional/organizational announcement about FLS requirements and testing availability. It does not demonstrate the peg transfer task or any laparoscopic skills performance. No scoring is possible.
